title: Ulcerative Colitis in Caucasians: 11 Herbal Essential Oils for Symptom Relief
description: Echinacea purpurea essential oils have anti-inflammatory properties that may help alleviate symptoms of ulcerative colitis. These oils contain compounds like echinacoside, caftaric acid, and chicoric acid, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the gut. Studies suggest that these properties can help soothe and protect the lining of the colon, reducing inflammation and promoting healing.
